title: DLS: Workplace Safety and Health Program — Detailed Information
description: MA DLS page describing WSHP inspection operations for public-sector workplaces: inspection priority order (imminent danger, fatality/accident investigation, high-hazard by comp rates, complaints/referrals, follow-up, random programmed), the civil-citation process (up to $1,000 per violation), and site-specific targeting and employer rights/responsibilities.
notes: Civil citations carry penalties up to $1,000 per violation with a correction due date; extensions available for diligent progress with interim protections. No explicit complaint-filing deadline; complaints/referrals are one of six ranked inspection triggers.
